sentences.target: Wieso kommst du heute so spät nach Hause?
sentences.reading: /viˈzoː kɔmst du ˈhɔʏtə zoː ʃpɛːt naːx ˈhaʊzə/

translations.de: Wieso kommst du heute so spät nach Hause?
translations.ipa: /viˈzoː kɔmst du ˈhɔʏtə zoː ʃpɛːt naːx ˈhaʊzə/
translations.en: Why are you coming home so late today?
translations.es: ¿Por qué llegas tan tarde a casa hoy?
translations.it: Perché torni a casa così tardi oggi?
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天怎么这么晚才回家？
translations.yue: 你今日點解咁夜先返屋企？
translations.ru: Почему ты сегодня так поздно пришёл домой?
translations.pt: Por que você está chegando tão tarde em casa hoje?
translations.he: למה אתה חוזר הביתה כל כך מאוחר היום?
translations.tr: Bugün eve neden bu kadar geç geliyorsun?
translations.vi: Sao hôm nay bạn về nhà muộn vậy?
translations.ar: لماذا عدت إلى البيت متأخرا جدا اليوم؟
translations.nl: Waarom kom je vandaag zo laat thuis?
translations.uk: Чому ти сьогодні так пізно повертаєшся додому?
translations.hu: Miért érsz ma ilyen későn haza?
translations.hi: आज तुम इतनी देर से घर क्यों आए?
translations.pl: Dlaczego dziś wracasz tak późno do domu?
translations.el: Γιατί γύρισες σήμερα τόσο αργά στο σπίτι?
translations.nb: Hvorfor kommer du så sent hjem i dag?
translations.id: Kenapa kamu pulang begitu larut hari ini?
translations.sv: Varför kommer du hem så sent i dag?
translations.ro: De ce vii atât de târziu acasă azi?
translations.cs: Proč dnes přicházíš tak pozdě domů?
translations.da: Hvorfor kommer du så sent hjem i dag?
translations.fi: Miksi tulet tänään kotiin näin myöhään?
translations.ja: 今日はなんでこんなに遅く帰ってきたの？

tokens.explanation: Interrogative adverb meaning 'why'; initiates a direct question and occupies the initial position.
Finite main verb (present, 2nd person singular); predicate of the clause.
Personal pronoun, nominative singular; subject of the verb.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Degree adverb intensifying 'spät'.
Temporal adjective used adverbially; modifies the time of coming and is intensified by 'so'.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces the directional PP 'nach Hause' ('homewards').
Noun (dative singular) in the fixed expression 'nach Hause'; complement of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Wieso ist der Bus schon wieder zu voll?
sentences.reading: /viˈzoː ɪst deːɐ bʊs ʃoːn ˈviːdɐ tsuː fɔl/

translations.de: Wieso ist der Bus schon wieder zu voll?
translations.ipa: /viˈzoː ɪst deːɐ bʊs ʃoːn ˈviːdɐ tsuː fɔl/
translations.en: Why is the bus packed again?
translations.es: ¿Por qué el autobús está otra vez tan lleno?
translations.fr: Pourquoi le bus est encore bondé ?
translations.it: Perché l'autobus è di nuovo pieno?
translations.ko: 버스가 왜 또 이렇게 꽉 찼어?
translations.pt: Por que o ônibus está lotado de novo?
translations.he: למה האוטובוס שוב כל כך מלא?
translations.tr: Otobüs neden yine bu kadar dolu?
translations.vi: Sao xe buýt lại đông nghịt thế nữa?
translations.nl: Waarom zit die bus alweer zo vol?
translations.hu: Miért van megint ilyen tele a busz?
translations.hi: बस फिर से इतनी भरी क्यों है?
translations.pl: Dlaczego autobus znowu jest taki zatłoczony?
translations.el: Γιατί το λεωφορείο είναι πάλι τόσο γεμάτο?
translations.nb: Hvorfor er bussen så full igjen?
translations.sv: Varför är bussen så full igen?
translations.ro: De ce e autobuzul iar atât de aglomerat?
translations.cs: Proč je autobus zase tak plný?
translations.da: Hvorfor er bussen så fuld igen?
translations.fi: Miksi bussi on taas niin täynnä?
translations.ja: なんでバスまたこんなに混んでるの？

tokens.explanation: Interrogative adverb meaning 'why'; initiates the clause.
Copular auxiliary (present, 3rd person singular); links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Definite article (determiner) marking 'Bus' as definite; nominative masculine singular.
Common noun; subject of the copular clause.
Aspectual/temporal adverb meaning 'already'.
Adverb meaning 'again'; indicates repetition.
Degree adverb meaning 'too'; intensifies the adjective 'voll'.
Adjective functioning as predicate complement with the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Wieso klappt mein Passwort auf der Seite nicht?
sentences.reading: /viˈzoː klapt maɪn ˈpasvɔʁt aʊf deːɐ ˈzaɪtə nɪçt/

translations.de: Wieso klappt mein Passwort auf der Seite nicht?
translations.ipa: /viˈzoː klapt maɪn ˈpasvɔʁt aʊf deːɐ ˈzaɪtə nɪçt/
translations.en: Why doesn't my password work on the site?
translations.es: ¿Por qué no funciona mi contraseña en el sitio?
translations.fr: Pourquoi mon mot de passe ne marche pas sur le site ?
translations.it: Perché la mia password non funziona sul sito?
translations.ko: 왜 이 사이트에서 내 비밀번호가 안 돼?
translations.zh-Hans: 为什么我的密码在这个网站上用不了？
translations.yue: 點解我個密碼喺呢個網站用唔到？
translations.ru: Почему мой пароль не работает на этом сайте?
translations.pt: Por que minha senha não funciona no site?
translations.he: למה הסיסמה שלי לא עובדת באתר?
translations.vi: Sao mật khẩu của tôi không hoạt động trên trang web này?
translations.ar: لماذا لا تعمل كلمة المرور الخاصة بي على الموقع؟
translations.nl: Waarom werkt mijn wachtwoord niet op de site?
translations.uk: Чому мій пароль не працює на цьому сайті?
translations.hu: Miért nem működik a jelszavam az oldalon?
translations.hi: इस साइट पर मेरा पासवर्ड काम क्यों नहीं कर रहा है?
translations.pl: Dlaczego moje hasło nie działa na tej stronie?
translations.el: Γιατί δεν λειτουργεί ο κωδικός μου στο σάιτ?
translations.nb: Hvorfor fungerer ikke passordet mitt på siden?
translations.id: Kenapa kata sandi saya tidak berfungsi di situs ini?
translations.sv: Varför funkar inte mitt lösenord på sidan?
translations.ro: De ce nu merge parola mea pe site?
translations.cs: Proč mi na tom webu nefunguje heslo?
translations.da: Hvorfor virker min adgangskode ikke på siden?
translations.ja: なんでこのサイトでパスワードが通らないの？

tokens.explanation: Interrogative adverb meaning 'why'; clause-initial.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd person singular) meaning 'to work/function'; predicate.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Passwort'; part of the subject noun phrase.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Preposition selecting dative here; introduces the locative PP 'auf der Seite'.
Definite article (determiner), dative feminine singular with 'Seite'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'auf' in a locative PP.
Negation particle marking sentential negation.

sentences.target: Wieso kostet der Kaffee hier so viel?
sentences.reading: /viˈzoː ˈkɔstət deːɐ kaˈfeː hiːɐ zoː fiːl/

translations.de: Wieso kostet der Kaffee hier so viel?
translations.ipa: /viˈzoː ˈkɔstət deːɐ kaˈfeː hiːɐ zoː fiːl/
translations.en: Why does the coffee cost so much here?
translations.es: ¿Por qué cuesta tanto el café aquí?
translations.fr: Pourquoi le café coûte-t-il si cher ici ?
translations.it: Perché il caffè qui costa così tanto?
translations.zh-Hans: 这里的咖啡怎么这么贵？
translations.pt: Por que o café aqui é tão caro?
translations.he: למה הקפה כאן כל כך יקר?
translations.tr: Burada kahve neden bu kadar pahalı?
translations.vi: Sao cà phê ở đây đắt vậy?
translations.ar: لماذا القهوة هنا غالية إلى هذا الحد؟
translations.nl: Waarom is de koffie hier zo duur?
translations.hu: Miért ilyen drága itt a kávé?
translations.hi: यहाँ कॉफी इतनी महंगी क्यों है?
translations.pl: Dlaczego kawa tutaj jest taka droga?
translations.el: Γιατί ο καφές εδώ είναι τόσο ακριβός?
translations.nb: Hvorfor er kaffen her så dyr?
translations.id: Kenapa kopi di sini begitu mahal?
translations.sv: Varför är kaffet här så dyrt?
translations.ro: De ce e cafeaua aici atât de scumpă?
translations.cs: Proč je tady káva tak drahá?
translations.da: Hvorfor er kaffen her så dyr?
translations.fi: Miksi kahvi on täällä niin kallista?
translations.ja: ここのコーヒーはなんでこんなに高いの？

tokens.explanation: Interrogative adverb meaning 'why'; clause-initial.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd person singular); predicate indicating price.
Definite article (determiner) for 'Kaffee'; nominative masculine singular.
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Locative adverb modifying the clause.
Degree adverb intensifying 'viel'.
Degree adverb expressing quantity; measure complement to 'kostet'.
